name: OpenIPAHound 10 Support - Host Access Overview
description: Shows users and groups with modeled SSH or sudo access to FreeIPA hosts. Use this as the first host-access inspection query; aggregate HBAC service detail stays in the research query because it is service-specific context, not default pathfinding.
query:
MATCH p=(principal)-[access:IPA_CanSSH|IPA_CanSUDO]->(host:IPA_Computer)
WHERE principal:IPA_User OR principal:IPA_Group
RETURN p, type(access) AS access_type, access.hbacrule AS hbac_rule, access.sudorule AS sudo_rule, access.nopassword AS sudo_nopassword
LIMIT 1000
